_doc: Humor 4th category. 9 fixed comedic mechanisms per room. Style (japandi/modern_classic/scandi) only changes the FINISH via palette.json (same gag, executed in the room's materials) — the absurdity stays, the expensive-minimalist execution is the extra comedy layer. alt/alt2 = different gags of the SAME mechanism, not just material swaps.

living.en: a single household object scaled to sofa size used as the main seat (giant polished pebble / oversized book / colossal remote)
an ornate throne-bed built for a fat house cat, treated as the room's centerpiece, human furniture pushed aside
a full medieval samurai armor stand awkwardly repurposed to hold the TV remote and coasters
a wall-hung rug with deer print and crystal glassware cabinet, grandma-USSR style, jarring against the refined room
a literal life-size carved 'elephant in the room' standing calmly as a sculptural anchor
a hammock slung between two minimalist columns replacing the sofa entirely
an oversized avocado-shaped armchair with a pit-shaped side table
a vintage claw-machine arcade cabinet as the feature piece, prizes visible inside
a serene meditating Buddha statue wearing chunky VR goggles, wired to nothing

bedroom.en: a wristwatch scaled to bed size used as the actual bed, strap as headboard
a grand canopy bed sized and styled for a single pampered dog, human cot tiny beside it
a knight's suit of armor standing guard as the bedside valet holding pyjamas
a wall carpet over the headboard plus a folding 'stenka' wall-unit, Soviet apartment vibe
a literal 'sleeping like a log' — a giant carved wooden log as the bed
a playground ball-pit sunken where the bed should be, ladder to climb in
a giant fried-egg shaped bed, yolk as the pillow mound
a glittering rotating disco ball as the only ceiling fixture over the bed
a taxidermy deer head wrapped in glowing neon tubing above the bed

bathroom.en: a rubber duck scaled to bathtub size serving as the actual tub
a luxurious clawfoot tub clearly built and decorated for a cat's spa day
a medieval iron knight helmet repurposed as the sink basin
a wall rug beside the tub and a chrome-crystal soap holder, USSR bathroom kitsch
a literal 'money down the drain' — golden coins sculpted swirling into the drain
a playground slide delivering you straight into the bathtub
a halved-watermelon shaped bathtub, seeds as decorative tiles
a gumball-machine dome dispensing bath bombs as the vanity feature
a classical marble bust wearing a snorkel mask and neon halo over the sink

kitchen.en: a single colossal fork standing floor-to-ceiling as the kitchen island sculpture
a chef-station built for a cat, tiny apron and stool, human counter shrunk
a cast-iron medieval cauldron on a chain serving as the modern range
a wall rug by the table plus an aluminium ZIL fridge and crystal vazochka, Soviet kitchen
a literal 'too many cooks' — a dense cluster of identical chef figurines crowding the counter
a hammock strung across the kitchen replacing the dining chairs
a giant donut-shaped kitchen island, glaze as the worktop
a working pinball machine built into the kitchen island
a garden gnome chef statue with glowing neon eyes manning the stove
